description: IRIS CLI scaffold manifest. The installer fetches this file from GitHub raw (or heyiris.io when configured), then downloads each entry to the user's ~/.iris/ directory. Adding a new how-to is just a PR adding the file + a line here.

files.purpose: Top-level rules file. Loaded into every session by packages/opencode/src/session/system.ts. Keep small (~500 tokens) — it points to how-to/ for deep content.
Index of all how-to recipes. The agent lists this directory and reads README.md to find the right recipe.
SOM pipeline: discover → enrich → dispatch outreach across LinkedIn / Twitter / Instagram.
Connect a machine to the IRIS Hive and dispatch a distributed task.
Atlas OS flow: capture lead → create deal → send proposal → contract → payment gate.
Full payment gate flow: contract + proposal page + Stripe checkout + auto-reminders. Covers PaymentGateService, line items, deliverables, and deal-status tracking.
Diagnose 5 common install failure modes: baseline asset mismatch, macOS version floor, missing deps, scaffold fetch fail, branding. Includes quick diagnostic command to send users.
Genesis page builder: create pages, valid component types, pull/edit/push workflow, component-showcase reference.
Deal pipeline management: list active deals, check status, send reminders, win-back stale deals, heartbeat autonomous recovery.
Master index for curating the Discover page — all CLI surfaces (sponsors, streamers, producers, instrumentals, opportunities, tutorials, investments) with links to deeper recipes and known gaps.
Capture and manage investor interest on marketplace opportunities — the dual-sided opportunity flow (workers apply, investors fund).
Price videos and articles as paid tutorials on the Discover Learning tab. Sets price_usd; green pill auto-renders on the card.
Feature producer profiles and curate instrumentals on the Discover Community tab via platform_configs.
